历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated from approximately 53967 to 66475 to 88306 to 67377 to 78313, showing an overall trend of moving backward with fluctuations. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023, followed by a recovery in 2024, with the 2025 baseline around 78313. The cumulative backward shift over the past 3 years is about 11946 places. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 215 in 2021, 241 in 2022, 256 in 2023, 255 in 2024, and 291 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 312, an increase of 21 students (about 7.2%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science China University Ranking has risen steadily from 165th in 2021 to 135th in 2026, indicating an improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. It ranks 58th in Douyin platform popularity (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. During the 2022 reputation cycle, there was some negative public opinion related to dormitory conditions, but no significant negative events in recent years, maintaining a stable overall reputation. No records of enrollment gaps were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above. The advantageous disciplines are mainly in agriculture (crop science, plant protection, etc., rated B+), medicine (clinical medicine rated B-), and teacher training, placing the university's academic strength at a medium to lower level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information continue to be highly popular socially, matching the university's enrollment in electrical and computer majors. Majors like Agriculture and Veterinary Medicine have average popularity. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 369,000, an increase of about 6,000 (1.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend. Shihezi University is located in the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, about 3,000 kilometers from Hebei Province, a remote location that somewhat suppresses the willingness of Hebei candidates to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 2–3%, making it a relatively small-scale province in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 78313, a 7.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), a slight increase in local Physics Category candidates (+1.6%), a continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (which slightly intensifies competition due to improved university level), moderate to high Douyin popularity (acceptable attention), and remote geographic location (suppressing application willingness), the backward shift effect of the enrollment expansion slightly outweighs the forward shift effects of other factors. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 81904, with a range of 81404 to 82404.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Shihezi University's medical programs in Hebei Province over the past five years are: 2021: 45,772 (plan: 34), 2022: 66,475 (plan: 42), 2023: 51,613 (plan: 24), 2024: 48,558 (plan: 34), 2025: 63,946 (plan: 46). Rankings fluctuated significantly over the five years. In 2022, the plan expanded to 42, causing a sharp drop to 66,475. In 2023, the plan reduced to 24, and the ranking rebounded to 51,613. In 2024, the plan returned to 34, and the ranking continued to rise to 48,558. In 2025, the plan expanded to 46, and the ranking dropped sharply again to 63,946. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan further expands to 50, an increase of 4 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 8.7%. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, expansion will cause the admission ranking number to increase further.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shihezi University is located in the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region. It is a national key university under Project 211 and a Double First-Class construction university, classified as a comprehensive public undergraduate institution. As an important base for medical education in Xinjiang, its medical programs have a certain influence in the northwest region, but in Hebei Province, it is a mid-west collaborative enrollment school, and candidates have relatively limited awareness of it.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs nationwide continue to maintain high application popularity, with core programs like clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Shihezi University is located in Xinjiang, a remote area geographically, which has weak appeal to Hebei candidates. However, the Project 211 and Double First-Class labels still attract some candidates who value university level. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan expands to 50, increasing the scale of medical enrollment in Hebei Province, which somewhat alleviates competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model and recent ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shihezi University's medical programs in 2026 is approximately 67,082, with a ranking range of 66,582 to 67,582. Compared to 63,946 in 2025, the ranking number continues to increase, meaning admission difficulty slightly rises, mainly due to the impact of enrollment expansion accompanied by a simultaneous increase in applicant numbers.
